subject: Action needed: beagle planning in Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q2 review | INIT-4705
body: Here is a progress summary for the beagle plan in Canberra. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Validate staffing, budget assumptions, and handoff checkpoints. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Mahatma Gandhi as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-4705. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: risk, risk.
